file_insights.changes: Updated Plan model references from field-based to slug-based lookup. Changed Plan field names: 'display_name' → 'name', added 'slug' and 'tier' fields. Updated get_or_create calls to use slug instead of name as lookup key. Changes applied across django_db_setup, organization, free_plan, starter_plan, and make_organization fixtures.
file_insights.reason: Core test fixture file - these changes ensure test database setup aligns with updated Plan model schema, preventing fixture-related failures across entire test suite

file_insights.changes: Updated template reference from 'user.organization.plan.display_name' to 'user.organization.plan.name' to match renamed Plan model field
file_insights.reason: Admin UI display fix - ensures plan names display correctly in the admin layout without raising AttributeError

file_insights.changes: Updated OrganizationWithPlanFactory to use slug-based Plan lookup instead of name-based. Updated Plan field definitions to use 'name' instead of 'display_name', added 'slug' and 'tier' fields
file_insights.reason: Factory pattern change - ensures test factories generate valid Plan objects matching updated schema, critical for test data generation

patterns_discovered.description: Systematic refactoring of Plan model field structure replacing 'display_name' with 'name', adding 'slug' as primary lookup identifier and 'tier' as classification field
Multiple fixtures (django_db_setup, organization, free_plan, starter_plan, make_organization) all updated consistently with same Plan field mapping, indicating coordinated schema migration
Added 'is_default': True to FREE plan across all fixture definitions, establishing default plan concept in schema
Plan.objects.get_or_create() calls changed from name-based to slug-based lookups, improving data integrity through unique slug identifiers

gotchas_discovered.description: Renaming Plan.display_name to Plan.name required updates across fixtures, factories, and templates. Missing even one reference would cause AttributeError at runtime
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Grep-based search to catch all display_name references; exhaustive template scanning

gotchas_discovered.description: Changed get_or_create() lookup key from 'name' to 'slug' is a breaking change. Existing code still using name-based lookups will fail to find plans
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify all Plan lookups in codebase converted to slug-based; add migration guide for existing data

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple fixtures and factories all creating 'FREE' and 'STARTER' plans - if schema changes aren't synchronized across all definitions, tests will fail with duplicate/mismatch errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Centralize Plan fixture creation or validate all definitions match

gotchas_discovered.description: Admin template expected plan.display_name; if Plan model doesn't have display_name field or migration fails, admin UI will break silently or show None
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify model migration exists and includes all new fields before deployment

approach_outcome.task_description: Verify Django Admin is accessible and functional
approach_outcome.strategy: Updated Plan model schema references across test fixtures, factories, and templates to verify admin functionality with new model structure
approach_outcome.execution: Systematically updated all Plan.objects.get_or_create() calls to use slug-based lookup and renamed fields throughout conftest.py, admin template, and factory definitions
approach_outcome.completion_status: Complete - All necessary files updated to maintain Django Admin functionality with new Plan model schema

recommendations.recommendation: Run full test suite to verify all Plan fixtures initialize correctly with new schema
recommendations.rationale: Multiple fixture updates require validation that database setup succeeds without errors

recommendations.recommendation: Create/verify Django migration for Plan model schema changes (slug, tier fields; display_name→name rename)
recommendations.rationale: Changes appear to be code-level but require database schema migration in production

recommendations.recommendation: Audit entire codebase for remaining 'display_name' references to Plan model
recommendations.rationale: Template fix applied but other code sections may still reference old field names

recommendations.recommendation: Audit entire codebase for remaining name-based Plan lookups (Plan.objects.filter/get with name=)
recommendations.rationale: Slug-based lookup pattern introduced but existing queries may still use name field

recommendations.recommendation: Consolidate Plan fixture creation into single source of truth to prevent drift
recommendations.rationale: Plan creation duplicated across 4+ fixtures creates maintenance burden and sync risk

recommendations.recommendation: Add explicit test case for Django Admin plan display with new model schema
recommendations.rationale: Template change should be explicitly tested to prevent regression
